properties.dose: Oral Common: 16-22mg/kg NOTE: Doses are for Ibogaine HCL. Potency of ibogaine root bark can vary from roughly 2.5-6% ibogaine content.
properties.effects: Addiction help, Euphoria, empathy, insight, brightened colour, Closed/Open eye visuals, enhanced tactile sensation, mental/physical stimulation, decreased appetite, pupil constriction, restlessness, change in perception, ego softening, sweating/chills, muscle tension, confusion, insomnia.
properties.summary: An alkaloid found in many plants in Africa, most famously Iboga, that has psychedelic and hallucinogenic properties. Reported to often be unpleasant. Traditionally used in tribal environments for coming-of-age rituals, it has recently been used as an alternative treatment for substance use disorders. There is on-going research on the efficacy of this. The drug has numerous risks and has killed in overdose. Further research and caution is strongly advised.

_general: Toxicity of ibogaine is associated with a lengthened QT interval in the electrophysiology of the heart - http://www.nejm.org/doi/full/10.1056/NEJMc0804248#t=article
signs of neurotoxicity found in animal testing - http://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/030645229390500F
